commands.girlfriends.affection.not_a_gir: The specified entity is not a Girlfriend character
message.girlfriends.invite_home_failed: Failed to invite home. Please check if your respawn point is a double bed.
message.girlfriends.invite_home_no_respa: Please set your respawn point before inviting home.
girlfriends.gift.disliked: It seems that %1$s doesn't like your gift, affection %2$s
girlfriends.gift.daily_cap_reached: %1$s doesn't want any more gifts today...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.favorite.min: This is... honeycomb? Thank you. The bees will be happy too.
You remembered I like this... Mm, I'll treasure it.
The scent of honeycomb always reminds me of the quietest afternoons in the garden. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.favorite.gir: Such a beautiful bouquet... You picked each flower carefully, didn't you?
When flowers gather together, it's like they're whispering secrets. From now on... can I whisper secrets with you too?
This bouquet will never wither—because it's from you. I'll tend to it forever.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.0: You always manage to pick things that touch my heart.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.1: Thank you. This will help me tend the garden.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.2: Mm, I like it. Let's use it in the greenhouse.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.3: The things you give... they all carry such a gentle feeling.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.4: I'll take it. Next time you come to the garden, you'll see it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.5: These go so well with flowers. Thank you for thinking of this.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.6: With this, life in the garden has one more thing to look forward to.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.7: It seems you know what I like better than I do now.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.0: Thank you, I'll put it to good use.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.1: Mm, I accept it. You're always so thoughtful.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.2: Though I don't usually use these... since it's from you...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.3: Thanks. Every time you visit, this place feels a little warmer.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.4: This is a thoughtful gift. I'll remember it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.5: Mm, I'll keep it in the storage. It'll come in handy for the garden someday.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.0: Mm... I'm not sure how to use this in the garden...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.1: Thank you for the thought. But the flowers and bees probably don't need this.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.2: Maybe it'd be better to give it to someone who needs it more?
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.3: I've received your kindness. It's just... it doesn't have a place in my garden.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.0: This... will hurt my flowers. Please take it away.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.1: I don't like things like this. It reminds me of the sound of petals being torn by a storm.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.2: Flowers are delicate. They can't bear things like this...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.3: Maybe you don't understand, but the garden has no need for things that wither and rot.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.4: Please take it back. The scent of decay will lead the bees astray.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.favorite.min: Another nautilus shell... The sea it has heard—is it the same one I've listened to?
Thank you. I'll place it on the lighthouse windowsill, so it can keep listening to the tides.
The spirals on this shell are perfectly intact. Did you find it somewhere far away?
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.0: Mm, this is good. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.1: You know what I like. That's rare.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.2: Out on the sea, this is the most practical. I'll take it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.3: When the tide recedes, it leaves good things on the sand. This you picked is one of them.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.4: Thanks. Let's bring it along next time we set sail.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.5: No need for many words. You give it, I take it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.6: Mm, it's stowed in the cabin.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.7: Some things don't need long choosing. One glance, and you know they're good. Like this.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.1: Mm, it might come in handy during the voyage.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.2: Alright. It's in the dock chest.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.3: Your kindness—the tides will help me remember it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.4: Thank you. Sometimes things from the shore are almost as interesting as things from the sea.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.5: I'll take it. I may not talk much, but I understand your feelings.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.0: This... I don't know what it could do on the boat.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.1: The waves wash away what isn't needed. This, too.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.2: Perhaps it's not that it's bad. It just has no fate with the sea.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.3: Thank you. But space on the boat is small—every inch has its purpose.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.0: Take it back. Things like this shouldn't appear by the sea.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.1: The sea wind tells me this is nothing good.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.2: It will pollute the shore. Please take it away.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.3: I don't like it. Things from the sea have keener instincts than they appear—they hate this too.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.4: Things like this... will make the schools of fish swim the other way.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.favorite.m: Iron ingot. Pure composition. You know your stuff.
Good iron. A good start. I'll take it.
This is the most valuable thing I've received today. Including what I mined myself.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.1: Taken. Can be used next time the furnace is lit.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.4: This is serious stuff. More useful than the words you say.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.6: This kind of thing is useful. Unlike those flashy but useless decorations.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.7: Another good material. Your judgment is more reliable than most.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.1: Alright. Can find a use for it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.2: Not the best material, but not useless either. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.3: Leave it there. We'll see later.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.4: Fine enough. At least you didn't come empty-handed.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.5: Might come in handy someday. That's how materials are—useless now, not necessarily later.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.0: This thing has no hardness. I have no use for it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.1: Material quality is too poor. You keep it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.2: Can't go in the furnace. Can't be forged. No use to me.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.3: Maybe you don't know what good material is. Next time I'll tell you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.0: Take it away. This doesn't deserve to be in my chest.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.1: I've spent my life with flames and anvils—this isn't even scrap.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.2: Flashy and useless. I hate things that catch the eye but do nothing.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.3: Don't put this near the anvil. It will taint it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.4: I'd rather have a piece of gravel than this.
Blaze rod! Whoa, did you snatch this from a blaze? Nice.
Hot enough, bright enough. That's why I like it—just like you.
One more blaze rod, and my blade gains another edge of flame. Thanks, partner.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.0: Good stuff! Hard currency on the battlefield.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.1: Alright, I like practical things. I'll take it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.2: Ha, good eye. This kind of thing can save your life in a fight.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.3: Straightforward. Not like those roundabout things.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.4: With equipment like this, charge up front with me next time. Beside me, not behind me.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.5: Perfect timing. Just ran short after the last battle.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.6: Fighting isn't a solo game—good gear matters more. Thanks, mate.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.7: Huh. I think you pick weapons better than I do. Let's go pick some together next time.
Not combat supplies, but useful for daily life.
Alright, in the supply bag it goes.
Something from you—I won't throw it away. Rest easy.
Thanks. Though I'd rather see you alive on the battlefield.
Days without battle need these too. I get it.
This won't help on the battlefield. You keep it.
Not hard enough. Not sharp enough. Not fast enough. Not my style.
Maybe you've got the wrong idea—I'm not the type who likes little trinkets like this.
If you're trying to make me happy, wrong approach. Next time just challenge me to a fight.
Cold, soft, edgeless things—I don't need them. Take them.
Things like this remind me of those who gave up the fight. Don't let me see it.
I'd rather face ten blazes than touch this.
You thought I needed this? No. I earn my own warmth.
Combat taught me one thing: the most dangerous thing isn't blades—it's things that make people soft. Take it back.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.favorite.m: Ender pearl. Observation: extremely high integrity. Conclusion: you were very careful during collection. I'm very satisfied.
Every ender pearl contains the coordinate data of a non-Euclidean space. This one's data is very clear. Thank you.
Hypothesis: when you picked this, you already knew I'd like it. Verification—I've already smiled. You didn't see?
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.0: Observation complete: this is a high-quality sample. Accepted.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.1: Interesting. It has relevance to my current research. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.2: Inference: you knew I needed this. Data point matches.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.3: Plus one experimental material. Your understanding of my research topic is improving.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.4: Conclusion: can be used for reference. I'll record it in the experiment log.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.5: Hypothesis confirmed: the longer I spend with you, the higher the quality of samples received.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.6: This can advance phase 3 of my spatial leap research. You probably don't know that, but it's very important.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.7: Another one on the lab shelf. Those empty shelves that had no use... you've helped me fill almost half of them now.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.0: Receipt confirmed. Logged in the experiment record.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.1: Not essential for research, but consumable in daily experiments. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.2: Observation result: there's room for optimization. But it's usable.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.3: Received. Every experiment needs auxiliary materials—are you my auxiliary material supplier now?
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.4: Perhaps a future experiment will use it. Archiving for now.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.5: Before data is verified, I won't make too many judgments. But... thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.0: This has no correlation with the current research direction.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.1: Temporarily no scenario where I can use it. Suggest you reallocate.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.2: Insufficient data... unable to determine use. But currently, the experiments don't need it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.3: Perhaps it's not your fault—its physical properties simply have no reference value for my research.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.0: Conclusion: high-entropy substance. It will contaminate the experimental environment. Please remove it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.1: Chaos and disorder are catastrophic for precision experiments. You should be able to understand that, right?
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.2: Do not place this near the research bench. It will introduce irreversible noise into the data.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.3: Perhaps it has value elsewhere—but in my laboratory, it is a confounding variable.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.4: Your kindness and this item's inherent properties are two separate things. I've received the kindness; please take the item away.
